title: Lyn Alden says Bitcoin needs no savior as Strategy sells $216M of BTC
summary: Lyn Alden says Bitcoin needs no savior as Strategy sells $216M of BTC
briefing: Bitcoin-focused macroeconomist Lyn Alden said BTC must stand on its own as Strategy sold 3,588 BTC, while warning about leverage risks tied to STRC.

title: Mobile app Toss and blockchain Optimism to conduct Korean won stablecoin POC : report
summary: Mobile app Toss and blockchain Optimism to conduct Korean won stablecoin POC : report
briefing: Toss has reportedly partnered with Optimism and Sunnyside Labs for a proof of concept on the feasibility of a Korean won-based stablecoin for payments.

title: ESMA turns spotlight on crypto custody risks after MiCA transition
summary: ESMA turns spotlight on crypto custody risks after MiCA transition
briefing: The EU securities regulator will assess custody providers’ key management, incident response and reliance on third-party technology providers.

title: Kalshi files same-day appeal of NY court's rejection of bid to block state gambling law enforcement
summary: Kalshi files same-day appeal of NY court's rejection of bid to block state gambling law enforcement
briefing: Kalshi appealed to the Second Circuit after a New York federal judge denied its request to block state gambling officials from enforcing local laws against its sports event contracts.

title: Berachain hard fork to replace dual-token model with WBERA rewards
summary: Berachain hard fork to replace dual-token model with WBERA rewards
briefing: Berachain launched the first stage of its PoL Next upgrade, which will phase out the BGT token and shift the network's reward system to WBERA.

title: Base to activate B20 standard for stablecoins, RWAs and other tokens
summary: Base to activate B20 standard for stablecoins, RWAs and other tokens
briefing: Base is scheduled to activate its B20 token standard on Wednesday at 6 pm UTC, allowing developers to begin creating native tokens on the network.

title: EU to again vote to extend ‘chat control’ rules
summary: EU to again vote to extend ‘chat control’ rules
briefing: So-called “chat control” rules could be revived in the EU, with lawmakers again set to vote on the legislation Thursday.

briefing: The company says the tool was designed to stop abuse and AI model extraction, but critics questioned the use of undisclosed monitoring.

summary: SEC's Long-Promised Crypto Safe Harbor to Be Introduced as Soon as This Month

summary: Tether Invests $20 Million in Mercado Bitcoin to Fuel Expansion Across Latin America
briefing: Brazilian crypto exchange Mercado Bitcoin has raised $20 million in fresh investment from USDT stablecoin issuer Tether.

title: AI Is Changing the Workplace and Universities Aren’t Keeping Up, Study Warns
summary: AI Is Changing the Workplace and Universities Aren’t Keeping Up, Study Warns
briefing: A University of Manchester researcher says schools should move beyond AI cheating concerns and prepare graduates for workplaces increasingly shaped by automation.

summary: BIG3 NFT Buyers Sue Ice Cube's Basketball League Over Alleged Unfulfilled Promises
briefing: Investors who purchased BIG3 NFTs expected the perks of team ownership, but allege "deceptive, fraudulent" marketing was at play.

summary: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
briefing: China is reportedly building the same power to cut off its AI that the US deployed against Anthropic in June.

title: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
summary: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
briefing: Built on Signal’s open-source technology, Radar Chat combines encrypted messaging with self-custodial Bitcoin payments via Lightning Network.
